common.siteDescription: Explore historical figures and events from multiple perspectives

header.searchAriaLabel: Open search dialog. Press Ctrl+K to search.
header.homeAriaLabel: Historical Parallax - Go to home page
header.editAriaLabel: Edit this article on GitHub (opens in new tab)

footer.poweredByAriaLabel: Parallax AI, LLC (opens in new tab)

article.contentInEnglish: This article is currently only available in English.

contribute.title: Contribute to Historical Parallax
contribute.subtitle: Help us build a comprehensive, balanced resource on historical figures and events.

gettingStarted.title: Getting Started
gettingStarted.description: We accept contributions in the form of Markdown files located in the {directory} directory. You can either create new articles or improve existing ones.

step1.title: Fork the Repository
step1.description: Go to our {link} and click the "Fork" button to create your own copy.

step4.title: Create Your Article
step4.description: Create a new file in {directory} with the naming format:

step6.title: Open a Pull Request
step6.description: Go to your fork on GitHub and click "Compare & pull request". Provide a clear description of your contribution.

articleFormat.title: Article Format
articleFormat.description: Every article must follow this exact Markdown structure:

guidelines.title: Content Guidelines
doItems: Include both positive and negative perspectives
Cite every factual claim with footnotes

editingArticles.title: Editing Existing Articles
editingArticles.step1: Navigate to the article page on our website
editingArticles.step2: Click the "Edit" button in the header to go directly to the file on GitHub
editingArticles.step3: Click the pencil icon on GitHub to edit the file
editingArticles.step4: Make your changes and submit a pull request
editingArticles.tip: Tip: You can also browse all articles directly at {link}

reviewProcess.title: Review Process
reviewProcess.description: After you submit a pull request:
reviewProcess.step1: Your PR will be reviewed for formatting compliance
reviewProcess.step2: Content will be verified for accuracy using AI-powered fact-checking
reviewProcess.step3: An editorial review will check for balance and quality
reviewProcess.step4: Once approved, your contribution will be merged and deployed

cta.title: Ready to Contribute?
cta.description: Your contributions help create a more comprehensive understanding of history.

intro.title: 1. Introduction
intro.content: Historical Parallax is committed to protecting your privacy. This policy explains how we handle any information when you use our service.

collection.title: 2. Information We Collect
collection.content: Historical Parallax does not require user registration or login. We do not collect personal information from our users.
collection.analytics: We may collect anonymous usage data through standard web analytics to improve our service, including:

cookies.title: 3. Cookies
cookies.control: You can control cookie settings through your browser preferences.

thirdParty.title: 4. Third-Party Services
thirdParty.content: We may use third-party services for:

security.title: 5. Data Security
security.content: Since we do not collect personal data, there is minimal risk to user privacy. Our service is served over HTTPS to ensure secure connections.

children.title: 6. Children's Privacy
children.content: Our service is available to users of all ages. We do not knowingly collect information from children under 13.

changes.title: 7. Changes to This Policy
changes.content: We may update this privacy policy from time to time. We will notify users of any changes by posting the new policy on this page.

contact.title: 8. Contact Us
contact.content: If you have questions about this privacy policy, please contact us at

acceptance.title: 1. Acceptance of Terms
acceptance.content: By accessing and using Historical Parallax, you accept and agree to be bound by the terms and provisions of this agreement.

use.title: 2. Use of Service
use.content: Historical Parallax provides informational content about historical figures and events. The content is provided for educational and reference purposes only.

accuracy.title: 3. Content Accuracy
accuracy.content: While we strive to provide accurate and up-to-date information, we make no representations or warranties of any kind about the completeness, accuracy, reliability, or suitability of the information provided.

perspectives.title: 4. Multiple Perspectives
perspectives.content: Historical Parallax presents multiple perspectives on historical figures and events. The inclusion of any perspective does not constitute endorsement by Historical Parallax or its operators.

sources.title: 5. Sources and Citations
sources.content: All information is sourced from publicly available materials. We provide citations where possible, but users should verify information independently for critical uses.

ip.title: 6. Intellectual Property
ip.content: The content, organization, and presentation of Historical Parallax are protected by copyright and other intellectual property laws. Images and media may be subject to separate licenses as indicated.

liability.title: 7. Limitation of Liability
liability.content: In no event shall Historical Parallax or its operators be liable for any direct, indirect, incidental, special, or consequential damages arising from the use of this service.

changes.title: 8. Changes to Terms
changes.content: We reserve the right to modify these terms at any time. Continued use of the service after changes constitutes acceptance of the new terms.

contact.title: 9. Contact
contact.content: For questions about these terms, please contact us at

notFound.title: 404 - Page Not Found
notFound.description: The page you are looking for does not exist.
